name: Fokus Mining Corporation
summary: Fokus Mining Corporation, a mining exploration company, engages in the acquisition, exploration, and development of mining properties in Canada. The company explores for rare earth elements and rare metals, as well as gold, silver, and copper deposits. It owns a 100% interest in the Kipawa-Lac Sairs property comprises 23 claims covering an area of approximately 3,200 hectares located in Northwest Qu√É¬©bec; and 80% interest in the Golden Moon project situated in the Chibougamau area in the province of Quebec. The company also holds a 50% undivided interest in 18 mining claims, including a part of the Copper Point Property in the Chibougamau area, Quebec; and 100% interest in the Teslo project that includes 16 mining claims covering an area of approximately 960 hectares located in northwest Buckingham, Qu√É¬©bec, as well as owns interest in the Gaboury property situated within the Ville-Marie - Belleterre archean volcano-sedimentary belt. The company was formerly known as Fieldex Exploration Inc. and changed its name to Fokus Mining Corporation in August 2020. Fokus Mining Corporation is headquartered in Rouyn-Noranda, Canada.
